name: Orea, the Sylvan High Arbiter
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>森</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>羅</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ら</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しず</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>がみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> オレイア
desc:
2 Level 7 monsters
Once per turn: You can send 1 Plant-Type monster from your hand or face-up from your side of the field to the Graveyard; look at a number of cards from the top of your Deck equal to the Level that the sent monster had in the hand or on the field, then place them on the top of the Deck in any order. Once per turn: You can detach 1 Xyz Material from this card; choose a number from 1 to 3, then excavate that many cards from the top of your Deck, send any excavated Plant-Type monsters to the Graveyard, and if you do, return up to that many cards on the field to the hand (min.1), except this card. Also, place the other cards on the bottom of your Deck in any order.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Looks at cards from the top of the player's Deck
Places cards from the player's Deck on the top of the Deck
Sends excavated cards to the Graveyard
Sends from the top of your Deck to your Graveyard
Places excavated cards on the bottom of the Deck
summoning: Does not require specific Xyz Materials
